rollback_boundary: Single-commit revert via `git revert <impl-sha>` restores C-3 (3f33a5b) state byte-for-byte: DEFAULT_MODES['columbo'].llm_profile reverts to None (= F62 behavior verbatim); tests/test_character_v2.py reverts to C-3-shipped suite (no TestColumbo* / TestTierOneModesPermanentlyStatic classes; test_mastery_level_not_present docstring reverts to 'deferred to C-4'); MASTER_PLAN.md Phase 17L row reverts to in-progress, Phase 17M row removed, Active Phase Pointer reverts to W-30-C3-PHILOSOPHY-BUREAUCRAT line. All other production code paths unchanged (runner.py + tools.py + dossier/* + gamification/* + banner.py + repl_input.py + chat.py + console.py were never edited). tool count unchanged (28). No DB migration to roll back. No new global file to clean up. No deps to remove. DEC-C4-COLUMBO-101 supersession of DEC-30-CHARACTER-V2-002 disposition reverts implicitly (test_drunken_master/chuck_norris/bobby_hill_terminally_static tests are gone post-revert). DEC-C4-COLUMBO-102 mastery_level permanent-retire reverts implicitly (the existing test_mastery_level_not_present gate predates C-4 but its docstring goes back to 'deferred to C-4'). Rollback safety identical to C-3's: pure-data revert with no side effects in workspace files, no migration state, no external system to reconcile.
acceptance_notes: Phase 17L closeout (C-3 merge 3f33a5b / impl e4f7ffe) is C-4's responsibility per dispatch context. The MASTER_PLAN.md Phase 17L row and the Plan Status table row for W-30-C3-PHILOSOPHY-BUREAUCRAT both flip from in-progress to completed with SHAs in the SAME implementer commit as source (AP #74 orphan-prevention). Active Phase Pointer line re-pointed from W-30-C3-PHILOSOPHY-BUREAUCRAT to W-30-C4-COLUMBO. Tokenizer choice: existing _rough_token_count (4-chars-per-token) reused for parity. context_hooks shape: tuple[str, ...] unchanged from C-1; conditional-hint convention 'when slot <slot> is <status>: <voice line>' (DEC-C4-COLUMBO-103). columbo is FIRST persona with non-empty context_hooks. Other 5 v2 personas keep context_hooks=() (DEC-C4-COLUMBO-104). fourth_wall_stance='opaque' (DEC-C4-COLUMBO-006). DEC-C4-COLUMBO-101 supersession: drunken_master/chuck_norris/bobby_hill flip UPGRADE -> terminal KEEP_STATIC; v1-carrier preserved. DEC-C4-COLUMBO-102 permanent retire: mastery_level field RETIRED; no core/persona_mastery.py module. After C-4 lands, v2 character roadmap CLOSED (6 UPGRADE + 4 KEEP_STATIC terminal). Implementer commit message follows `feat(character-v2): C-4 columbo LLMPersonaProfile + dossier-aware context_hooks + tier-1 KEEP_STATIC + mastery_level retire` with body referencing #30, DEC-C4-COLUMBO-001..006 + DEC-C4-COLUMBO-101..104, and noting v2 character roadmap closure.
ready_for_guardian_definition: All required_tests are green (every entry passes when executed verbatim against implementer HEAD SHA). Full test suite green via `pytest tests/ -q` (zero failures; total count >= C-3 baseline + ~19 new C-4 tests; reviewer pastes exact count). Every git-diff entry in required_evidence captured verbatim — 'MUST be empty' diffs confirmed empty (paste each); modes.py + test_character_v2.py + MASTER_PLAN.md diffs bounded by allowed_paths. Every real-path check captured (two ap chat demos in tmp/evidence-c4-columbo/; dossier-vocabulary audit prints expected slot/status value sets; grep + python audits paste actual output). Every authority invariant verified by its named test (or by architectural disconnection where named). Every integration point has named edit verified by diff. No forbidden shortcut taken. MASTER_PLAN.md edited in SAME commit as source: Phase 17M appended with binding decisions and Decision Log (DEC-C4-COLUMBO-001..006 + DEC-C4-COLUMBO-101..104); Phase 17L row flipped to completed with C-3 SHAs (merge 3f33a5b / impl e4f7ffe); Plan Status table row for W-30-C4-COLUMBO added; Plan Status table row for W-30-C3-PHILOSOPHY-BUREAUCRAT flipped to completed with SHAs; Aggregate paragraph updated to acknowledge v2 character roadmap closure; Active Phase Pointer re-pointed to W-30-C4-COLUMBO. Implementer commit message follows `feat(character-v2):` prefix and references #30 + DEC-C4-COLUMBO-001..006 + DEC-C4-COLUMBO-101..104 and notes v2 character roadmap closure. tmp/c4-scope.json registered into runtime via cc-policy workflow scope-sync before implementer dispatch and unchanged at landing time. Reviewer emits `REVIEW_VERDICT=ready_for_guardian` at implementer head SHA after all the above are confirmed.
